## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening

## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format`, `dart analyze --fatal-infos`, and `dart test` pass for every
      package I touched.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the behavior I changed.
- [ ] I updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` where relevant.
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or recovery phrases are committed.
- [ ] If this touches cryptography or the wire protocol, I described the security
      reasoning above.

## Security considerations

Does this change the threat model, key handling, or anything an attacker could
reach? If not, say "none".
